title: T10559 PM-Core V2 hierarchy violation detection report
key_findings: Read-only copied tasks.db analysis found 0 parent_id cycles, 174 blank/null type rows, 353 tier matrix parent/child violations, 0 missing parent edges, and 31 active non-epic/non-saga orphan roots.
needs_followup: Decide whether legacy archived/cancelled blank-type rows should be migrated, quarantined, or exempted from strict checks.
Split the 353 tier matrix violations into safe automatic repairs versus owner-reviewed hierarchy redesigns.
Triage the 31 active orphan roots for promotion, reparenting, or explicit standalone exception handling.
